data.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD hash stability in compute-diff-hash.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 2 test functions to tests/hooks/test-compute-diff-hash.sh:

1. test_hash_rebase_excludes_incoming_only: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Set up divergent history. Simulate REBASE_HEAD state by writing .git/REBASE_HEAD AND .git/rebase-merge/onto AND .git/rebase-merge/orig-head (NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD). Stage incoming-only files. Compute hash twice (simulating review-time and commit-time). Verify hashes match (hash stability) and that incoming-only files do not affect the hash.

2. test_hash_rebase_failsafe_missing_onto: Create REBASE_HEAD state but omit onto file. Verify script falls through to default behavior (hash computed over full diff) without error.

IMPORTANT: Each test must use its own mktemp -d with trap cleanup. Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head, NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD.

## TDD Requirement
Both tests FAIL (RED) because compute-diff-hash.sh has no REBASE_HEAD handling. Tests invoke the script and compare hash outputs.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-compute-diff-hash.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 2 new REBASE_HEAD test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_hash_rebase" tests/hooks/test-compute-diff-hash.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'compute-diff-hash.*test_hash_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
